app.rdg: 1. Stab tih칥lh Lokaristi?
1. stab ti툾i톫 Lokaristi.
1. what the eucharist
1. What is the eucharist?
Tihilh Lokaristi dcho Sakrema aku tsokwab eku stolegwad gwalh Shesu-Kri askro, aku tsid칥lh Shesu-Kri boku.
ti툾i톫 Lokaristi d톛c팳'u툾 Sakrema 툾톛 k퉝i c퉢uk퉢퉝톛b 툾i k퉝i stulig퉝톛d g퉝톛톫 Shesu-Kri 툾톛sq퉢퉝u툾, 툾톛 k퉝i c톛di톫 Shesu-Kri b톛k퉢퉝.
the eucharist one sacrament of the body and the blood belonging_to Jesus_Christ together of the that Jesus_Christ all
The eucharist is a sacrament of the body and the blood of Jesus Christ together, of the entire Jesus Christ.
Whe gwa stab gwa saplel, dayai srwekrokus saplels, eta stlokos saplels, eta saplel alakrops.
x퉝i툾 g퉝톛stab g퉝톛saplil, day퉢ay퉢 sq퉝톛q퉢퉝us saplils, 툾i t톛 s톫a툾x팳us saplils, 툾i t톛 saplil 툾톛 l톛k퉢퉝톛bs.
not much bread only white bread and the round bread and the bread of eaten
Not a lot of bread, only white bread, and round bread, and edible bread.
Dilh dahu as gwalh Shesu-Kri tsokwab eta boku Shesu-Kri askro.
di톫 d톛x퉝톛s g퉝톛톫 Shesu-Kri c퉢uk퉢퉝톛b 툾i t톛 b톛k퉢퉝 Shesu-Kri 툾톛sq퉢퉝u툾 .
that way belonging_to Jesus_Christ body and the all Jesus_Christ together
That is how the body of Jesus Christ and Jesus Christ entire.
Whe gwa stab gwa wain dayai gwalh wain rlhte kro, eta gwalh wain skwalhs, etas wain alakrops.
x퉝i툾 g퉝톛stab g퉝톛wain day퉢ay퉢 g퉝톛톫 wain x팳톛톫 ti q퉢퉝u툾 , 툾i t톛 g퉝톛톫 wain sk퉢퉝톛톫s, 툾i t톛 swain 툾톛 l톛k퉢퉝톛bs.
not much wine only belonging_to wine seems the water and IRR wine pouring and the wine of ingestible
A little bit of wine only, water that looks like wine, and pouring some wine, and drinkable wine.
Dilh dahu as gwalh Shesu-Kri stolegwad, eta boku Shesi-Kri askro.
di톫 d톛x퉝톛s g퉝톛톫 Shesu-Kri stulig퉝톛d, 툾i t톛 b톛k퉢퉝 Shesu-kri 툾톛sq퉢퉝u툾.
that how IRR Jesus_Christ blood and the entire Jesus Christ together
That is how the blood of Jesus Christ, and the entire Jesus Christ together.
2. Alchad kus o hoyutobs lale aku leple ku saplel gwa tla hoyil gwalh Shesu-Kri tsokwab,
2. 툾al c팳ad s툾uhuyut톛bs l톛li툾 툾톛 k퉝i leple k퉝i saplil g퉝톛톫uhuyil g퉝톛톫 Shesu-Kri c퉢uk퉢퉝톛b,
2. at where made other by the priest the bread change belonging_to Jesus_Christ's body
2. Where is the bread changed into Jesus Christ's body by the priest?
'tlalba alchad kus o hoyutobs lale aku leple ku wain gwa tla hoyil gwalh Shesu-Kri stolegwad?
쿹'al퉢b톛 툾al c팳ad k퉝i s툾uhuyut톛bs l톛li툾 툾톛 k퉝i l톛pl톛 k퉝i wain g퉝톛톫uhuyil g퉝톛톫 Shesu-Kri stulig퉝톛d?
and at where the made other by the priest the wine made belonging_to Jesus_Christ blood
and where is the wine changed into Jesus Christ's blood by the priest?
Al lames kus o hoyutobs lale aku leple ku saplel gwa tla hoyil gwalh Shesu-Kri tsokwab,
툾al lam톛s k퉝i suhuyut톛bs l톛li툾 툾톛 k퉝i l톛pl톛 k퉝i saplil g퉝톛톫uhuyil gw톛톫Shesu-Kri c퉢uk퉢퉝톛b,
at mass the making other by the priest the bread changed belonging_to Jesus Christ body
At the mass is where the bread is changed into Jesus Christ's body by the priest
'tlalba al lames kus o hoyutobs lale aku leple ku wain, gwa tla hoyil gwalh Shesu-Kri stolegwad.
쿹'al퉢b톛 툾al lames k퉝i suhuyut톛bs l톛li툾 툾톛 k퉝i leple k퉝i wain, g퉝톛톫uhuyil g퉝톛톫 Shesu-Kri stulig퉝톛d
and at mass the made other by the priest the wine changed belonging_to Jesus_Christ blood
and at the mass is where the wine is changed into Jesus Christ's blood by the priest.
3. Stab tih칥lh lames?
3. stab ti툾i톫 lames.
3. what the mass
3. What is the mass?
Tih칥lh lames gwalh Shesu-Kri tsokwab, eku stolegwad tu sabijobs, rolab aku tu dhual lekwe.
ti툾i톫 lames g퉝톛톫 Shesu-Kri c퉢uk퉢퉝톛b, 툾i k퉝i stulig퉝톛d tus툾abiyit톛bs, x팳퉝ul퉢ab 툾톛 k퉝i tudx퉝툾al lekwe.
The mass is the body of Christ and the blood gotten only ??????? on the cross.
4. Asared ku tlo alaluschelh al kus lames?
4. 툾톛s툾톛x팳id k퉝i 톫u툾alalusc팳톛톫 툾al k퉝si lames.
4. how the behave+we at the mass
4. How should we behave at the mass?
Tlo achelh al kus lames aku halh, tlo tegwidchelh di Sherk-Siam tlo pet칡degwassebchelh aku tsoku,
톫u툾a툾c팳톛톫 툾al k퉝si lames 툾톛 k퉝i ha툾톫, 톫ut퉢ig퉝id c팳톛톫 di s팳톛q si툾ab 톫up톛tidg퉝as톛bc팳톛톫 툾톛 k퉝i c톛k퉝,
be+we at the mass of the good FUT pray+we the sky nobleman thinking+we of the correct
We should be good at the mass, we pray to God that our thoughts be correct,
gula whe kwi tlo sogukrtsutchelh aku pa'tla'tl.
g퉝톛l x퉝i툾 k퉝i 톫ug톛q퉢cutc팳톛톫 툾톛 k퉝i p퉢a쿹퉢a쿹퉢.
then not the open+self+we of the foolishness
and we don't open ourselves up to foolishness
